description: 发送给大模型的输入数据样例

prompts.text:
You are an AI assistant helping navigate a drone. Based on the current observation and history, navigate to the red building.

Stage: intermediate
Current Position: [125.34, -89.67, -45.23]
Last Movement: Moved forward 1.2m, left 0.3m
Target: Red building at approximately [150.5, -95.2, -42.0]
Distance to Goal: 28.73m

Provide the next waypoint as relative coordinates (dx, dy, dz) and distance.
prompts.note: 完整的提示文本，包含任务、状态、目标信息

prompts.text:
You are an AI assistant helping navigate a drone. Based on the current observation and history, find the blue car.

Stage: early
Current Position: [89.12, -120.45, -38.90]
Last Movement: Initial position
Target: Blue car location unknown
Distance to Goal: unknown

Provide the next waypoint as relative coordinates (dx, dy, dz) and distance.

images.description: 处理后的图像张量列表

per_sample.num_frames_note: 5个历史帧 + 当前帧的拼接/选择

images.note: 每个样本包含多帧图像，实际为torch.Tensor列表

per_sample.encoding: 位置、速度、方向等传感器数据的编码

return_waypoints.description: 控制标志：是否返回航点

use_cache.description: 控制标志：是否使用KV缓存

instructions: Navigate to the red building on your left and stop near its entrance.
Find the blue car and approach it from the front.
